description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style projector with a rectangular metal body, predominantly finished in light gray with blue accent panels. The sides feature large blue access panels, one of which is marked with the brand 'THOMSON-CSF' and a bold yellow number '4'. The front face houses a prominent lens assembly, partially recessed and protected by angular black flanges. The top surface includes two sturdy carrying handles and a blue perforated ventilation grill, while the rear face is equipped with a control panel featuring several buttons, dials, and a display screen. Additional features include a yellow circular port on one side and a large black adjustment knob on the opposite side, suggesting advanced functionality and adjustability.
description: A heavy-duty, rectangular projector with a gray metal body, blue accent panels, and prominent lens and control features. It includes handles, ventilation grills, and branded markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lens assembly recessed behind angular black flanges, a blue perforated ventilation grill, and a top handle.
description_view_1: Side view displays the blue access panel with 'THOMSON-CSF' branding, a large yellow number '4', and a yellow circular port.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the control panel with buttons, dials, a display screen, and a handle on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights another blue access panel, the large black adjustment knob, and the number '4'.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'THOMSON-CSF' is visible on both side panels, printed in white on a blue rectangular background with a small emblem to the left.
attribute_lens_type: fixed lens, large circular shape, partially recessed with protective flanges; no visible adjustment rings for zoom or focus.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the rear face, featuring several physical buttons, dials, and a display screen, all clearly labeled for operational control.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Ventilation is provided by a blue perforated metal grill on the top surface and a series of small round perforations along the upper side panels.
